candidates.title: Backtest Date Filtering
candidates.source: Backtests ran over the full CSV even when reviewers wanted a restricted date range.

candidates.title: Historical Backtest Runs CLI
candidates.source: No way to list prior local backtest runs from .atlas/backtests/.
candidates.acceptance_criteria: atlas backtest runs lists runs; --json and --validate modes work.

candidates.title: Realized PnL Tracking
candidates.source: Sell fills did not carry realized PnL, making trade metrics impossible.
candidates.acceptance_criteria: Sell fills populate realized_pnl; metrics use it.

candidates.title: Backtest Report Schema Contract
candidates.source: result.json structure was implicit; no schema contract existed.
candidates.acceptance_criteria: Schema backtest.report.v1 defined; validator raises on violations.
candidates.reason: Formalizes report contract; no execution changes.

candidates.title: Strategy Entry-Point Dogfooding
candidates.source: Built-in strategies were not verified via entry-point discovery.
candidates.acceptance_criteria: Entry points declared; tests verify discovery.
candidates.reason: Improves test coverage; no runtime changes.

candidates.title: Backtest Report Validation UX
candidates.source: atlas backtest runs did not surface schema validation status.
candidates.acceptance_criteria: --validate emits schema_status, schema_valid, schema_error, schema_errors, schema_version.

candidates.title: Dashboard / Report Schema Status
candidates.source: Dashboard/report quality output did not expose latest schema state.

candidates.title: Markdown Diagnostics & Fills Summary
candidates.source: Markdown reports lacked diagnostics and fills summary.
candidates.acceptance_criteria: Diagnostics and Fills Summary sections render.

candidates.title: Structured Validation Details
candidates.source: Validation errors were not surfaced in Markdown.

candidates.title: Accumulated Schema Errors
candidates.source: validate_backtest_report raised on first error only.

candidates.title: Unreadable Report Surfacing
candidates.source: Unreadable result.json files were silently skipped by --validate.

candidates.title: Markdown Trade Percentage Metrics
candidates.source: BacktestMetrics had percentage fields but Markdown omitted them.

rejected.title: Live trading default changes
rejected.reason: Safety boundary. Never changed in a patch.

rejected.title: Broker execution enablement
rejected.reason: Safety boundary. Never changed in a patch.

rejected.title: Provider execution unlock
rejected.reason: Safety boundary. Never changed in a patch.

rejected.title: PyPI publish
rejected.reason: Not approved in this planning batch; requires separate process.

rejected.title: Automatic skill activation
rejected.reason: Skill candidates remain manually reviewed and offline.

rejected.title: Automatic learning execution
rejected.reason: Learning suggestions remain offline and manually reviewed.

rejected.title: New broker adapters (Binance completion, CCXT enablement, IBKR implementation)
rejected.reason: New features, not maintenance. Defer to v0.7.0 or later minor release.

rejected.title: Dashboard rewrite or new UI capabilities
rejected.reason: Out of patch scope. Requires design review. Defer to v0.7.x.

safety_boundaries: Live trading remains disabled by default.
Live submit remains disabled by default.
Provider execution remains disabled by default.
Broker execution remains disabled by default.
Risk gates remain deterministic and unchanged.
Human approval remains required for live order flow.
Credentials are not loaded unless explicitly configured.
No provider APIs, broker APIs, or real webhooks are called from CI or local checks.
constraints: Version is bumped to 0.6.9 in pyproject.toml and src/atlas_agent/__init__.py
No tag, GitHub release, or PyPI publish yet
release_criteria: dev_check, ci_check, and release_check --quick pass locally
CI on main is green after the prep commit is pushed
Version is bumped to 0.6.9 in pyproject.toml and src/atlas_agent/__init__.py
scripts/check_v069_release_prep.py and matching tests are created
Owner approval is obtained for tag cutover
